title_en: The Shocking Truth About Red Dye 3
title_es: La Impactante Verdad Sobre el Colorante Rojo 3
hook_en: Did you know this candy ingredient is banned in Europe?
hook_es: ¿Sabías que este ingrediente de caramelos está prohibido en Europa?
key_message: Red Dye 3, used in many US foods, is linked to health issues and banned in parts of Europe.
visual_elements: close-up of candy with bright red color
pie chart showing countries banning Red Dye 3
comparison of US vs. European candy ingredients
_source_regulation_context:
ADDITIVES BANNED IN OTHER COUNTRIES BUT LEGAL IN US:
  • Red Dye 3 (Erythrosine): Candy, baked goods, maraschino cherries — Banned in: EU (partially), Austria, Norway — Health concern: Linked to thyroid tumors in animal studies; FDA acknowledged carcinogenicity in 1990 but only banned in cosmetics

US OBESITY RATES OVER TIME:
  • 1960: 13.4% (adults), 5.0% (children)
  • 1980: 15.0% (adults), 5.5% (children)
  • 1994: 22.5% (adults), 10.0% (children)
  • 2000: 30.5% (adults), 13.9% (children)
  • 2010: 35.7% (adults), 16.9% (children)
  • 2016: 39.8% (adults), 18.5% (children)
  • 2020: 41.9% (adults), 19.7% (children)
  • 2024: 43.0% (adults), 21.0% (children)

title_en: US Obesity Crisis: What's Behind the Numbers?
title_es: Crisis de Obesidad en EE.UU.: ¿Qué Hay Detrás de los Números?
hook_en: Let's break down the rising obesity rates!
hook_es: ¡Vamos a desglosar las tasas de obesidad en aumento!
key_message: US deregulation of food additives correlates with rising obesity rates over the decades.
visual_elements: animated graph showing obesity rate increase from 1960 to 2024
footage of healthy vs. processed food options
